title: Add Created and Last Updated Datetime Fields to Object Tables
description: Add `created_at` and `updated_at` datetime fields to the `objects` and `object_fields` tables to track when records are inserted and updated from Salesforce. Investigation revealed Laravel's Eloquent timestamps already provide this functionality, so no additional work was required.
acceptance_criteria: Object and object_fields tables have created_at and updated_at timestamps
Timestamps are automatically populated on insert and update
implementation_notes: Withdrawn — Laravel Eloquent timestamps already handle created_at and updated_at automatically.
comment_summary: Ryan confirmed Laravel tables already accommodate timestamps. Issue was withdrawn as no changes were needed.
